description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.
name: bmc-discovery-scan-status-list

outputs.description: Number of scanned hosts BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.total Number of hosts to scan
outputs.name: BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.done

outputs.description: IP ranges to scan BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.cancelled Is canceled
outputs.name: BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.valid_ranges

outputs.description: Is NO-PING option set BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.scan_options.SESSION_LOGGING Is SESSION_LOGGING option set
outputs.name: BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.scan_options.NO_PING

outputs.description: Is SKIP_IMPLICIT_SCANS option set BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.scan_options.MAX_START_SSM_SESSIONS Is MAX_START_SSM_SESSIONS option set
outputs.name: BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.scan_options.SKIP_IMPLICIT_SCANS

outputs.description: Is MAX_ACTIVE_SSM_SESSIONS option set BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.scanning Number of entities in scanning status
outputs.name: BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.scan_options.MAX_ACTIVE_SSM_SESSIONS

outputs.description: Number of entities in pre_scanning status BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.starttime Date
outputs.name: BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.pre_scanning

outputs.description: BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.waiting Number of entities in waiting status BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.uri
outputs.name: Scan start time

outputs.description: Scan URI BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.inferred Scan inferred URI
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Scan results URI BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.consolidating Is consolidating
outputs.name: BmcDiscovery.Scan.Status.results
